summary: Control plane architecture - 7 submodules with global and local runtime layers

modules.actions.js: Registry CRUD, lifecycle operations, project scanning, reconcile
modules.events.js: JSONL event log with redaction, pagination, streaming
modules.locks.js: File-based distributed async locks with TTL and stale takeover
modules.runs.js: Run lifecycle: start, persist, observe, readiness probe
modules.state.js: Registry persistence: v1/v2 format, atomic write, path planning

runtime_layers.global-runtime.js: Facade proxy over control-plane modules for cross-project visibility
runtime_layers.runtime.js: Project-local runtime: process spawn/stop/cleanup, local state, sync locks

ownership_model.probable-owned: No PID cascade but process evidence matches
ownership_model.stale-owned: Process dead but run record exists
ownership_model.external: Listener PID differs from run PID
